observed_failure.surface: PhysicsGuard projecting a current full TestMesh aggregation into its deeply nested OpenSpec evidence root on Windows
observed_failure.prior_local_claim: the generic immutable evidence writer and mutable projection pointer can publish a portable receipt below an external repository evidence root
observed_failure.observed_result: the immutable envelope first failed at MoveFileExW beyond the legacy path budget; after that write was repaired, the mutable ref parent creation failed for the same reason

classification.owner: SkillGuard immutable execution-record writer and OpenSpec projection pointer publisher
classification.error_signature: MoveFileExW or mkdir failed when the portable projection destination exceeded the legacy Windows path budget

root_cause_backpropagation.supported_cause: the portable projection modeled atomicity and immutability but did not normalize every Windows filesystem operation to one extended-length path representation
root_cause_backpropagation.would_have_failed_if: the model had included both immutable blob publication and mutable pointer replacement below a real nested external OpenSpec change root
root_cause_backpropagation.new_model_item: every physical filesystem operation in portable evidence publication must use the same Windows extended-length path conversion while portable wire paths remain canonical slash-separated relative paths
root_cause_backpropagation.owner_code_contract: execution_records.filesystem_path -> durable immutable writes and test_mesh._atomic_replace_projection_ref

generalized_repair.rule: Use one platform-aware physical path conversion for parent creation, temporary writes, immutable moves, mutable replacement, and cleanup without changing portable receipt wire paths.
generalized_repair.observed_regression: the real PhysicsGuard OpenSpec projection now publishes its immutable envelope, source manifest, sidecars, and mutable ref in the original deeply nested evidence root
generalized_repair.same_class_regression: Windows tests cover immutable destinations and mutable pointer parents beyond 260 characters, including idempotent immutable publication
generalized_repair.negative_boundary: the repair does not shorten, relocate, alias, or silently fall back to a second evidence root

required_revalidation: focused Windows immutable and mutable long-path regressions
transactional SkillGuard reinstall and installed self-host
real PhysicsGuard full aggregation replay and OpenSpec projection

revalidation_evidence.focused_regressions: 20 focused execution-record and projection tests passed
revalidation_evidence.real_external_projection: PhysicsGuard projection reached passed with execution_count=0 in the original nested evidence root

claim_boundary: The repair is validated for the current Windows workspace and PhysicsGuard projection path. It does not prove arbitrary filesystems, unrelated consumers, or future path lengths beyond platform support.
